# Scenario: Subagent footer shows correct agent/model from last message
# After streaming an assistant message with specific agent/model,
# the state should reflect the message's agent/model (not defaults).
# Uses "build" agent and "anthropic/claude-opus-4-6" which are in the
# scenario framework's mock caches.

:session ses_child_model
:parent-id ses_parent_model
:directory /tmp/test-project

# Mock API responses for refresh
:api GET /session/ses_child_model/message 200 [{"info":{"id":"msg_asst_m1","sessionID":"ses_child_model","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1771415771266,"completed":1771415771300},"agent":"build","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","tokens":{"input":100,"output":50,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}},"parts":[{"id":"prt_text_m1","sessionID":"ses_child_model","messageID":"msg_asst_m1","type":"text","text":"done"}]}]
:api GET /session/ses_child_model 200 {"id":"ses_child_model","title":"Sub-agent","parentID":"ses_parent_model","directory":"/tmp/test-project","time":{"created":1700000000,"updated":1700000000}}
:api GET /session/ses_child_model/todo 200 []

# Session becomes busy
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child_model","status":{"type":"busy"}}}}
:assert-busy

# Assistant message with specific agent/model
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.updated","properties":{"info":{"id":"msg_asst_m1","sessionID":"ses_child_model","role":"assistant","time":{"created":1771415771266},"agent":"build","modelID":"claude-opus-4-6","providerID":"anthropic","tokens":{"input":0,"output":0,"reasoning":0,"cache":{"read":0,"write":0}}}}}}

# Text part
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text_m1","sessionID":"ses_child_model","messageID":"msg_asst_m1","type":"text","text":"","time":{"start":1771415789728}}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"message.part.updated","properties":{"part":{"id":"prt_text_m1","sessionID":"ses_child_model","messageID":"msg_asst_m1","type":"text","text":"done","time":{"start":1771415789728}},"delta":"done"}}}

:assert-contains done

# Session goes idle (triggers refresh which calls state-init)
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.status","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child_model","status":{"type":"idle"}}}}
:sse {"directory":"/tmp/test-project","payload":{"type":"session.idle","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_child_model"}}}

:assert-idle

# After refresh, state should reflect the message's agent/model
:eval (should (equal (opencode-chat-state-agent opencode-chat--state) "build"))
:eval (should (equal (opencode-chat-state-model-id opencode-chat--state) "claude-opus-4-6"))
:eval (should (equal (opencode-chat-state-provider-id opencode-chat--state) "anthropic"))
